obligations.text: Obtain and record itemised consent per purpose before processing personal data; allow withdrawal as easily as giving it.
On consent withdrawal or purpose completion, erase personal data across all systems and cause processors to erase too, unless retention is legally required.
Apply reasonable security safeguards including encryption/obfuscation/masking of personal data.
Detect and notify personal data breaches to the Board and affected Data Principals; maintain logs and monitoring to detect unauthorised access.
Retain logs and personal data for at least one year to enable breach investigation, unless a longer period is required by law.
